# 02 - LAUNCH PLANS AND AD STRATEGY (CLIENT ACCELERATORS)
**Fonte:** Client Accelerators - Mike Buontempo
**Arquivos:** CA-0009 a CA-0015

---

## ESTRUTURA DE TIME

| Role | Funcao |
|------|--------|
| Project Manager | Coordenacao geral, prazos |
| Senior Media Buyer | Estrategia de midia, ROAS |
| Junior Media Buyer | Execucao de campanhas |
| Creative Strategist | Direcao criativa |
| Copywriter | Scripts, ad copy, VSLs |
| Data Analyst | Analytics, dashboards |

### Senior Media Buyer - KPIs
- 95% do bonus trimestral projetado
- 85% das metas de profit/ROAS dos clientes
- Monthly churn rate: <8%
- Creative win rate: 25%
- Internacional: $40-$50K/ano | US-based: $75-$85K/ano

---

## LAUNCH PLAN FRAMEWORK

### Componentes Obrigatorios
1. Executive Summary
2. Product and Offers - breakdown do funil
3. Buyer Personas (Tiers) - Tier 1 = maior LTV
4. Competitor Analysis
5. Stages of Awareness - 5 estagios, 6 tipos de lead
6. Tracking Setup - paginas, eventos, UTMs
7. MQL Process - scoring
8. SQL Pipeline - estagios de vendas
9. Growth Ideas (Needle Movers)
10. Baseline + Projections - worst/average/best
11. Data Analysis Framework
12. Creative Strategy
13. Campaign Rollout - ABO para teste, CBO para escala
14. Risk Management Matrix
15. Monthly Targets

### Estrutura de Funil Padrao
- Front End: $29-$67
- Order Bump: $47/mes (51-80% take rate)
- OTO 1: $97-$297
- OTO 2 Downsell: $47-$99
- OTO 3: $97
- Backend: $10K-$25K

### Tiers de Compradores
| Tier | Caracteristicas | Prioridade |
|------|----------------|------------|
| Tier 1 | Maior LTV, paga backend | MAXIMA |
| Tier 2 | Compra produtos mid-ticket | ALTA |
| Tier 3 | Apenas front-end | MEDIA |
| Tier 4 | Freebie seekers | BAIXA |

---

## CASOS DE ESTUDO - RESULTADOS REAIS

### Case 1: Microbanking Method
**Meta:** $1M/mes
**Funil:** $67 FE -> order bumps -> upsells -> backend $25K/$10K
- CPA inicial: $236
- Liquidacao melhorou: 34% -> 54%
- Revenue: $118K -> $346K
- ROAS: 2.9x -> 6.18x

### Case 2: Cherrington Media
**Baseline:** $400-500K/mes com 8-9 agencias
**Funil:** $67 FE -> $297 OTO1 -> $47/mes bump (80% take rate)
- Backend sales: 68 -> 124/mes (+82%)
- Revenue: $474K -> $980K (+107%)
- ROAS: 0.27x -> 2.10x
- Profit: $294K -> $580K

### Case 3: Freedom Funders (Credit Repair)
**Funil:** $29 FE -> $47/mes bump (51% take rate) -> $197 OTO1
- ROAS: 0.58x -> 3.66x
- Revenue: $9.5K -> $58K
- Lucro: -$7K -> +$38K

### 7 Padroes Universais de Alto Desempenho
1. Social Proof at Scale - Testemunhos + numeros grandes
2. Before/After Contrast - Transformacao visual
3. Authority Borrowing - CNBC, NBA
4. Mathematical Specificity - Numeros exatos
5. Time-Based Simplicity - X minutos, X dias
6. Lifestyle Aspiration - Resultado de vida desejado
7. Curiosity-Driven Hooks - Abertura que cria tensao
